creator: vd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: vd->bapt

Assigning to libreoffice maintainer, as changes to its Makefile are 
required. The following patch to editors/libreoffice/Makefile should fix it: 

--- cut --- 
--- Makefile.orig	2011-07-07 09:04:40.000000000 +0300 
+++ Makefile	2011-07-07 09:06:28.000000000 +0300 
@@ -92,6 +92,7 @@ 
wps-0.2.2:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/libwps  
rdf.0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/redland  
textcat.0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/libtextcat  
+		vigraimpex:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/vigra  
lpsolve55:${PORTSDIR}/math/lp_solve 

BUILD_DEPENDS=	zip:${PORTSDIR}/archivers/zip  
@@ -103,8 +104,7 @@ 
${LOCALBASE}/bin/gperf:${PORTSDIR}/devel/gperf  
${LOCALBASE}/lib/libcppunit.so:${PORTSDIR}/devel/cppunit  
${LOCALBASE}/lib/libmdbsql.a:${PORTSDIR}/databases/mdbtools  
-		${LOCALBASE}/lib/libboost_regex.a:${PORTSDIR}/devel/boost-libs  
-		${LOCALBASE}/lib/libvigraimpex.a:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/vigra 
+		${LOCALBASE}/lib/libboost_regex.a:${PORTSDIR}/devel/boost-libs 

USE_BDB=	yes 
USE_PERL5_BUILD=	yes 
--- cut --- 

Please, let me know if any changes to graphics/vigra are needed or if 
libreoffice strictly needs the old version of vigra 1.6. 

Thanks!
